---
code-block-bg: true
code-block-border-left: "#31BAE9"
bibliography: references.bib
---

::: {style="text-align: justify"}
# Custom scripts

Below you find a list of custom scripts for bioinformatic analyses. All of these can be found on Crunchomics in the following location: `/zfs/omics/projects/bioinformatics/scripts`:

:::


```{python}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis

import pandas as pd
from IPython.display import HTML
from itables import show

# Read CSV
scripts = pd.read_csv("../../data/scripts_inventory.csv")
scripts = scripts[["Script name", "Category", "Description", "Link"]]

# Convert Link to HTML anchor
scripts["Link"] = scripts["Link"].apply(
    lambda url: f'<a href="{url}" target="_blank">Link</a>' if pd.notna(url) else ""
)

# Render as HTML table
show(
    scripts,
    classes="display compact",
    columnDefs=[
        {"className": "dt-left", "targets": "_all"},
        {"width": "150px", "targets": 0},  # Script name
        {"width": "100px", "targets": 1},  # Category
        {"width": "400px", "targets": 2},  # Description (widest)
        {"width": "60px",  "targets": 3},  # Link
    ],
    lengthMenu=[10, 25, 100],
    scrollX=True,
    allow_html=True,
    autoWidth=False  # Critical: disables DataTables auto width calculation
)
```
